## Checklist

- [ ] Every changed or added link works (`lychee --accept 200,201,204,301,302,303,308,403,429 --timeout 30 "**/*.md"`)
- [ ] Module cards keep their format: Topics → Resources → Supplement → Build → Note
- [ ] If this changes what a learner does (resources, sequencing, requirements): an issue is linked where it was discussed first
